mapper.select: SELECT `r`.`index` AS `roomIndex`, `r`.`title` AS `title`, `lm`.`message` AS `lastMessage`, `lm`.`created_at` AS `lastMessageAt`, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `wh`.`chat_messages` `m` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`chat_room_reads` `cr` ON `cr`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` AND `cr`.`emp_id` = #{empId} WHERE `m`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` AND `m`.`index` > COALESCE(`cr`.`last_read_message_index`, 0)) AS `unreadCount` FROM `wh`.`chat_rooms` `r` INNER JOIN `wh`.`chat_users` `u` ON `u`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` AND `u`.`emp_id` = #{empId} LEFT JOIN (SELECT `m2`.`room_index` AS `room_index`, MAX(`m2`.`index`) AS `max_index` FROM `wh`.`chat_messages` `m2` GROUP BY `m2`.`room_index`) `mm` ON `mm`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`chat_messages` `lm` ON `lm`.`index` = `mm`.`max_index` ORDER BY `lm`.`created_at` DESC, `r`.`index` DESC

SELECT `r`.`index` AS `roomIndex`, `r`.`title` AS `title`, `lm`.`message` AS `lastMessage`, `lm`.`created_at` AS `lastMessageAt`, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `wh`.`chat_messages` `m` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`chat_room_reads` `cr` ON `cr`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` AND `cr`.`emp_id` = #{empId} WHERE `m`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` AND `m`.`index` > COALESCE(`cr`.`last_read_message_index`, 0) ) AS `unreadCount` FROM `wh`.`chat_rooms` `r` INNER JOIN `wh`.`chat_users` `u` ON `u`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` AND `u`.`emp_id` = #{empId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT `m2`.`room_index` AS `room_index`, MAX(`m2`.`index`) AS `max_index` FROM `wh`.`chat_messages` `m2` GROUP BY `m2`.`room_index` ) `mm` ON `mm`.`room_index` = `r`.`index` LEFT JOIN `wh`.`chat_messages` `lm` ON `lm`.`index` = `mm`.`max_index` WHERE `r`.`index` = #{roomIndex} ORDER BY `lm`.`created_at` DESC, `r`.`index` DESC
